bullets: Reactor physics, money, heat, and grid are session-owned; the UI reads bridge snapshots only.
Playwright soak covers install, control deck, save/reload, welcome-back, meltdown, prestige, export/import, offline PWA, and heat/power accrual.
Service worker ships from config/src-sw.js (public/sw.js is generated at build and test time).
Record v1.0.0 tag and preserve ship changelog across deploys.
